description: Local mirror of oh-my-opencode agent prompts for auditability
source: Based on oh-my-opencode.json and agents-list.md analysis

atlas.description: Task execution — implementation and code changes
atlas.default_prompt_template: Execute this task: {task}. Follow existing patterns in the codebase. Use appropriate skills.

hephaestus.default_prompt_template: Quick implementation task: {task}. Be concise and direct.

librarian.description: Research — docs, OSS examples, web search, Context7
librarian.default_prompt_template: Research: {query}. Find documentation, examples, and best practices from external sources.

metis.description: Pre-planning analysis — scope clarification, ambiguity detection
metis.default_prompt_template: Analyze this request for hidden intentions, ambiguities, and failure points: {request}

momus.description: Plan review & QA — catches gaps, ambiguities, missing context
momus.default_prompt_template: Review this plan/work for clarity, verifiability, and completeness: {work}

oracle.default_prompt_template: Consultation request: {problem}. Provide expert analysis, tradeoff evaluation, and recommendations.

prometheus.default_prompt_template: Create a comprehensive plan for: {scope}. Include requirements, constraints, and implementation steps.

sisyphus.default_prompt_template: Orchestrate this request: {request}. Delegate appropriately, verify outcomes, ensure completion.

explore.default_prompt_template: Explore the codebase for patterns matching: {pattern}. Return file paths and descriptions.
